sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73175" key="o(lmiskoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλμ-ισκοειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n73175.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaped like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁλμίσκος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:22:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.22.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
